results.title: INSERT NEEDLE FOR CONTINUOUS GLUCOSE MONITORING SYSTEM

results.title: APPARATUS FOR MULTIMODAL ANALYSIS OF ALLERGIC REACTIONS IN SKIN TESTS AND A HYBRID METHOD FOR MULTISPECTRAL IMAGING OF ALLERGIC REACTIONS IN SKIN TESTS AND ITS USE FOR AUTOMATIC EVALUATION OF THE RESULTS OF THESE TESTS
results.abstract: A multimodal apparatus for analysis of allergic reactions during skin tests and a method of multispectral imaging of allergic reactions in case of the type I and the type IV allergic reactions induced by performing skin allergy Prick and Patch tests combine thermal imaging with Laser Doppler flowmet

results.title: Folate targeted enhanced tumor and folate receptor positive tissue optical imaging technology
results.abstract: A method of differentiating tumors from healthy cells in tissue is disclosed. The method includes the steps of providing a marker-folate conjugate, placing the marker-folate conjugate in contact with the tissue and viewing the tissue.

results.title: SYSTEM, METHODS AND APPARATUSES FOR IN SITU ELECTROCHEMICAL IMAGING
results.abstract: Systems, methods and apparatuses described herein generally provide a millimetre size package-free complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (“CMOS”) chip (referred to as a “die”) for the in situ (on-site) measurement or imaging of electrochemically detectable analytes.

results.title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR DETERMINING AT LEAST ONE VITAL SIGN OF A SUBJECT
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a system and method for determining a vital sign of a subject. To improve the detection of electromagnetic radiation reflected from or transmitted through skin of a subject (110) at least two differently modulated radiation sources (112, 114) are used. results.title: TRANSCUTANEOUS ANALYTE SENSOR
results.abstract: Abstract of the Disclosure The present invention relates generally to systems and methods for measuring an analyte in a host. More particularly, the present invention relates to systems and methods for transcutaneous measurement of glucose in a host.

results.title: Percutaneous biological fluid sampling and analyte measurement devices and methods
results.abstract: Devices and methods for sampling a biological fluid and measuring a target constituent within the biological fluid are provided. results.abstract: An optical measurement system comprises an optical source configured for generating source light having an optical wavelength spectrum. results.title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR PROCESSING AND TRANSMITTING SENSOR DATA
results.abstract: Systems and methods for processing, transmitting and displaying data received from an analyte sensor, such as a glucose sensor, are disclosed. results.title: Physiological signal monitoring device
results.abstract: A physiological signal monitoring device includes a base, a biosensor mounted to the base and adapted to measure an analytical substance, and a transmitter.
